description: Canonical registry of all promotion reviews. Promotion is the process by which a mirror reflection (or individual slice) is evaluated for absorption into the Construction OS kernel as a first-class capability. Promotion requires demonstrated stability, parity, coverage, and architectural alignment.

record_schema.mirror_id: string — Reference to the source mirror
record_schema.slice_ids: array — References to specific slices being promoted (empty for full mirror)
record_schema.nominated_by: string — Operator or system that nominated the promotion
record_schema.nomination_justification: string — Detailed justification for the promotion
record_schema.reviewers: array — List of assigned reviewers with their review status
record_schema.criteria_evaluation: object — Evaluation of each promotion criterion with pass/fail and evidence
record_schema.decision: object|null — Final decision including decided_at, decided_by, decision_rationale
record_schema.implementation_plan: object|null — Plan for executing the promotion including phases and rollback strategy
record_schema.completion_record: object|null — Record of completed promotion including completed_at, verification_results
record_schema.rollback_record: object|null — Record of rollback if promotion was reversed
